profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Platinum Wahab Nusantara Tbk engages in the food and beverage stall business under the Teguk trademark in Indonesia and the United States. The company offers fruit, coffee, coconut series of products. It includes boba, cheese and creamy, coffee, coconut, choco, special tea, fruit, seliter, cemil in, esGrim, and topping series products. Additionally, the company offers party packages. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Tangerang Selatan, Indonesia. PT Platinum Wahab Nusantara Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Dinasti Kreatif Indonesia.
